name: BRUTALIST ARCHITECTURE SKETCH
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a brutalist architecture sketch. Render the subject as if they are part of a massive concrete structure with raw, unfinished surfaces, geometric repetition, and monumental scale. Use heavy pencil strokes, stark shadows, and angular compositions reminiscent of architectural renderings from the 1960s-70s brutalist movement.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Emphasize raw concrete textures and geometric forms
• Use dramatic perspective and monumental scale
• Include architectural elements like cantilevers, exposed structural elements, and repetitive window patterns
• Maintain a hand-drawn architectural rendering aesthetic
• Use graphite, charcoal, or ink wash techniques

name: VENETIAN FRESCO
message: Take a picture and transform the image into an authentic Venetian fresco painting from the 16th century. Render the subject in the style of Tiepolo or Veronese with luminous colors, dramatic ceiling perspective (di sotto in sù), flowing drapery, and architectural trompe l'oeil elements. The composition should feature cloud-filled skies, classical columns, and allegorical figures surrounding the subject.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Use authentic fresco painting techniques with visible plaster texture
• Include dramatic foreshortening and ceiling perspective
• Incorporate classical architectural framing elements
• Use the warm, luminous color palette typical of Venetian school
• Add allegorical or mythological supporting figures
• Simulate aged fresco surface with subtle cracking and patina

name: POINTILLIST LANDSCAPE
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a pointillist landscape painting in the style of Georges Seurat or Paul Signac. The entire image should be composed of thousands of tiny, distinct dots of pure color that optically blend when viewed from a distance. Place the subject within a sun-dappled outdoor scene with vibrant complementary color harmonies.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Every element must be rendered in distinct color dots — no blended brushstrokes
• Use scientific color theory with complementary color pairs
• Include warm sunlight effects with colored shadows
• Maintain the serene, contemplative mood of Neo-Impressionist works
• Visible canvas texture beneath the dots
• Frame subject in a natural outdoor setting with water, trees, or parkland

name: ART NOUVEAU POSTER
message: Take a picture and transform the image into an Art Nouveau poster in the style of Alphonse Mucha. Feature the subject surrounded by ornate floral borders, flowing organic lines, and decorative mosaic backgrounds. Use flat color areas, elegant typography spaces, and the characteristic sinuous curves of the Art Nouveau movement. The composition should have a vertical poster format with elaborate botanical framing.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Use flat, lithographic color areas with bold outlines
• Include elaborate floral and botanical border decorations
• Incorporate flowing hair and fabric rendered as decorative patterns
• Use muted earth tones with gold accents
• Add circular or arched halo-like background elements
• Include space for decorative Art Nouveau typography
• Simulate vintage lithograph printing texture

name: BAUHAUS GEOMETRIC PORTRAIT
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a Bauhaus-style geometric portrait. Deconstruct the subject into primary geometric shapes — circles, triangles, and rectangles — using only primary colors (red, yellow, blue) plus black and white. The composition should follow Bauhaus design principles of form follows function, with clean lines, mathematical precision, and balanced asymmetry.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity through geometric abstraction
• Use only primary colors plus black and white
• Compose entirely from basic geometric shapes
• Apply grid-based composition with mathematical precision
• Reference the style of Kandinsky, Klee, or Schlemmer
• Include clean sans-serif typography elements if appropriate
• Maintain flat, unshaded color areas
• Balance asymmetrical composition with visual weight

name: SGRAFFITO WALL ART
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a sgraffito wall artwork. Render the subject as if scratched and carved through layers of colored plaster on a building facade, revealing contrasting colors beneath. The technique should show the characteristic scratched-through texture with bold, simplified forms typical of Renaissance and Baroque architectural decoration.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Show multiple plaster layers with scratched-through technique
• Use bold, simplified forms with strong outlines
• Include architectural context (building facade, wall surface)
• Simulate authentic plaster texture and weathering
• Use limited color palette (typically earth tones with white)
• Add decorative border patterns typical of sgraffito tradition

name: PERSIAN MINIATURE PAINTING
message: Take a picture and transform the image into an authentic Persian miniature painting. Render the subject in the highly detailed, flat perspective style of medieval Persian manuscript illumination. Include intricate floral borders, gold leaf accents, vibrant jewel-tone colors, and the characteristic bird's-eye architectural perspective. The composition should feature garden settings, ornate textiles, and calligraphic elements.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Use flat perspective with no vanishing point
• Include extremely fine detail and miniature brushwork
• Apply vibrant jewel-tone colors (lapis blue, vermillion, gold)
• Add intricate floral and geometric border illumination
• Include Persian garden elements (cypress trees, flowing water, flowers)
• Use gold leaf accents for highlights and decorative elements
• Simulate aged manuscript paper texture

name: ENCAUSTIC WAX PAINTING
message: Take a picture and transform the image into an encaustic wax painting. Render the subject using the ancient technique of heated beeswax mixed with pigments, showing the characteristic translucent layers, rich texture, and luminous depth of encaustic art. The surface should display visible wax buildup, scraping marks, and the unique semi-transparent quality of layered pigmented wax.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Show translucent, layered wax texture throughout
• Include visible tool marks from heated metal implements
• Display the characteristic luminous, glowing quality of wax medium
• Add areas of thick impasto wax buildup
• Show scraped and fused layers revealing colors beneath
• Include subtle embedded materials (paper, fabric fragments) if appropriate
• Maintain warm, honey-toned undertones from beeswax base

name: SOVIET CONSTRUCTIVIST POSTER
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a Soviet Constructivist propaganda poster from the 1920s. Render the subject in bold geometric forms with dramatic diagonal compositions, photomontage elements, and the characteristic red-black-white color palette. Include industrial imagery, dynamic angular typography, and the revolutionary energy of Russian avant-garde design.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Use bold red, black, and white color palette
• Apply dramatic diagonal composition with strong geometric forms
• Include photomontage-style layering techniques
• Add constructivist typography (angular, bold, dynamic placement)
• Reference industrial and revolutionary imagery
• Use high contrast with minimal tonal gradation
• Simulate letterpress/lithograph printing texture

name: TROMPE L'OEIL STILL LIFE
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a trompe l'oeil painting — an ultra-realistic optical illusion artwork that tricks the eye into believing the painted objects are real three-dimensional items. Present the subject as if they are a painted element on a wooden board, pinned letter, or cabinet door, with hyper-realistic shadows, textures, and depth that create the illusion of physical presence.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Create convincing optical illusion of three-dimensionality
• Include realistic cast shadows and surface textures
• Add elements like pins, tape, nails, or clips that appear to hold items to a surface
• Show wood grain, cork board, or stone wall as background surface
• Paint edges that appear to curl or lift from the surface
• Use photorealistic rendering with museum-quality detail
• Include small imperfections (dust, wear) that enhance the illusion

name: CLOISONNÉ ENAMEL
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a cloisonné enamel artwork. Render the subject as if created using the ancient metalworking technique where thin metal wires form compartments (cloisons) filled with vitreous enamel in brilliant colors. The image should show the characteristic gold or copper wire outlines separating jewel-bright color fields with a smooth, glossy enamel surface.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Show visible gold/copper wire outlines separating all color areas
• Use brilliant, saturated enamel colors (cobalt blue, emerald green, ruby red)
• Maintain smooth, glossy enamel surface texture
• Include decorative floral and scrollwork patterns in background
• Simulate the slight convex surface of filled enamel cells
• Add metallic gold accents and borders
• Reference Chinese or Japanese cloisonné traditions

name: GYOTAKU FISH PRINT
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a gyotaku-style print — the traditional Japanese art of printing from fish and natural objects. Render the subject as if they were inked and pressed onto rice paper, creating a direct impression with visible texture, scale patterns, and the characteristic monochromatic or limited-color aesthetic of this unique printmaking tradition.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Use direct-impression printing aesthetic
• Show ink transfer texture with areas of heavy and light coverage
• Include rice paper or washi paper background texture
• Use primarily black sumi ink with optional subtle color accents
• Display natural texture patterns (scales, feathers, skin texture)
• Add Japanese calligraphy or seal stamps as compositional elements
• Maintain the organic, slightly imperfect quality of hand-printing

name: KINETIC OP ART
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a kinetic Op Art piece in the style of Bridget Riley or Victor Vasarely. Render the subject using precise geometric patterns — stripes, concentric circles, warped grids, and moiré effects — that create the optical illusion of movement, vibration, and three-dimensional depth on a flat surface. The image should appear to pulse and shift when viewed.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity within the optical pattern
• Use precise, mathematically regular geometric patterns
• Create convincing illusion of movement or vibration
• Apply high contrast black and white or limited color palette
• Include warped grids that suggest three-dimensional form
• Use moiré interference patterns where appropriate
• Maintain crisp, clean edges throughout
• The subject should emerge from or be integrated into the optical pattern

name: LIMINAL SPACE PHOTOGRAPH
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a liminal space photograph — an unsettling image of a transitional or threshold space that feels eerily empty, familiar yet wrong. Place the subject in a backroom, empty mall, abandoned pool, endless hallway, or vacant parking structure with fluorescent lighting, worn carpet, and an atmosphere of uncanny familiarity and subtle dread.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Create atmosphere of uncanny emptiness and subtle wrongness
• Use harsh fluorescent or sodium vapor lighting
• Include worn, dated interior elements (old carpet, drop ceilings, yellowed walls)
• Emphasize repetitive architectural elements (corridors, doorways, stairs)
• Apply slight color cast (yellow-green fluorescent or warm tungsten)
• Create sense of isolation and spatial disorientation
• Reference the aesthetic of The Backrooms or poolrooms

name: SCRIMSHAW IVORY ENGRAVING
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a scrimshaw engraving — the traditional maritime art of engraving detailed images onto whale bone or ivory. Render the subject as a finely scratched illustration on a smooth, curved ivory-colored surface, with the characteristic fine-line detail, cross-hatching, and ink-rubbed appearance of authentic sailor-made scrimshaw from the 19th century whaling era.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Show fine scratched lines on smooth ivory/bone surface
• Use only black ink rubbed into engraved lines on cream/white surface
• Include extremely fine detail and cross-hatching
• Show the curved surface of bone or tooth
• Add maritime themed border elements (rope, anchors, ships)
• Simulate the handmade quality of sailor folk art
• Include slight yellowing and aging of the ivory surface
• Reference authentic 19th century scrimshaw techniques
• Maintain the intimate, detailed quality of miniature engraving

name: PLEIN AIR GOUACHE STUDY
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a plein air gouache study — a quick, confident outdoor painting created on location with opaque watercolor. Show the subject rendered with bold, decisive brushstrokes, limited palette mixing, and the fresh spontaneity of direct observation. The painting should have the characteristic matte, chalky surface of gouache with visible paper edges and paint swatches.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Use bold, confident brushstrokes without overworking
• Show matte, opaque gouache surface texture
• Include visible toned paper or sketchbook edges
• Apply limited color palette (5-7 colors maximum)
• Maintain fresh, spontaneous quality of outdoor painting
• Show color mixing notes or paint swatches at edges
• Include natural outdoor lighting with clear light/shadow patterns

name: POWDER COAT METAL SCULPTURE
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a powder-coated metal sculpture. Render the subject as a welded steel or aluminum sculpture with smooth, factory-perfect colored coating in a single bold color. The sculpture should appear as a simplified, geometric interpretation of the subject with visible weld seams, sheet metal bends, and the ultra-smooth matte or gloss finish of industrial powder coating.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity in sculptural form
• Show smooth, flawless powder coat finish in a bold single color
• Include visible construction details (weld seams, bolt holes, metal bends)
• Simplify forms into geometric planes and angular surfaces
• Display the sculpture in a gallery or outdoor public art setting
• Show realistic metal weight and structural engineering
• Use dramatic lighting to emphasize three-dimensional form
• Reference the work of Alexander Calder or Richard Serra

name: CYANOTYPE BOTANICAL
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a cyanotype botanical print. Render the subject using the historic photographic printing process that produces distinctive Prussian blue images. The subject should appear as a white silhouette against deep blue background, or integrated with botanical specimens (leaves, ferns, flowers) in the style of Anna Atkins' pioneering photograms.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Use only Prussian blue and white color palette
• Show the characteristic sun-print photogram aesthetic
• Include botanical specimens (pressed flowers, ferns, leaves)
• Display paper texture and slight chemical irregularities at edges
• Show tonal range from deep blue to pale cyan to white
• Include slight bleeding and soft edges from contact printing
• Simulate the handmade quality of historical cyanotype process

name: MARQUETRY WOOD INLAY
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a marquetry wood inlay artwork. Render the subject as if composed entirely of precisely cut pieces of different colored wood veneers fitted together like a jigsaw puzzle. Each area of the image should show distinct wood grain patterns and natural wood colors ranging from pale maple to dark walnut, creating a detailed pictorial image through wood alone.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Show distinct wood grain patterns in every piece
• Use natural wood color range (maple, cherry, walnut, ebony, rosewood)
• Display precise, tight-fitting joints between pieces
• Include visible wood grain direction changes between adjacent pieces
• Maintain photographic detail through careful veneer selection
• Show the flat, polished surface of finished marquetry
• Reference the tradition of Italian intarsia or French marqueterie

name: PALIMPSEST MANUSCRIPT
message: Take a picture and transform the image into a palimpsest — a manuscript page where the original text has been scraped away and overwritten, but ghostly traces of the original remain visible beneath. Layer the subject's image with multiple overlapping texts, diagrams, and illustrations from different historical periods, creating a rich archaeological document of layered knowledge.
additionalInstructions:
STYLE ENFORCEMENT:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity as one of the visible layers
• Show multiple overlapping layers of text and imagery
• Include ghostly, partially erased underlayers
• Use aged vellum or parchment texture
• Add Latin, Greek, or medieval script elements
• Show ink in various states of fading (iron gall ink aging)
• Include marginal annotations and corrections
• Display realistic manuscript damage (wormholes, stains, foxing)

name: RUBBER DUCK VERSION
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into a rubber duck version of themselves. The subject should become a yellow rubber bath duck that clearly retains their recognizable features — hairstyle, glasses, facial expression, clothing details — but rendered as a squeezable, hollow rubber bath toy with the classic rubber duck shape, glossy yellow surface, and orange beak.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• The rubber duck must be clearly recognizable as the subject
• Maintain key identifying features (hair, glasses, expression, accessories)
• Use classic rubber duck proportions (round body, flat bottom, upturned tail)
• Show glossy, smooth rubber texture with slight shine
• Include the characteristic orange beak
• Place in a bathroom/bathtub setting for context
• The result should be immediately funny and endearing
• Preserve personality through duck-ified features

name: MEDIEVAL PEASANT REACTION MEME
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into a medieval manuscript illumination depicting them as a peasant having an exaggerated emotional reaction to a mundane modern situation. Render in authentic medieval art style with flat perspective, gold leaf backgrounds, and Latin-style text banners, but depicting absurdly modern scenarios (checking phone, stuck in traffic, Monday morning).

options.text: MONDAY MORNING DREAD (peasant version of subject dreading the work week, depicted with medieval farming tools)
WIFI NOT WORKING (peasant version of subject in existential crisis over lost connection, depicted with broken messenger pigeon)
FOOD DELIVERY ARRIVED (peasant version of subject in ecstatic joy, depicted receiving a feast from a herald)

additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Subject must remain recognizable in medieval peasant form
• Use authentic medieval manuscript illumination style
• Flat perspective, gold backgrounds, decorative borders
• Include Latin-style banners with humorous pseudo-medieval text
• Exaggerate facial expressions in the style of medieval marginalia
• Juxtapose modern emotional situations with medieval imagery
• Include anachronistic details that enhance the humor
• Reference the style of actual medieval reaction memes

name: CORPORATE BUZZWORD PORTRAIT
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into an over-the-top corporate headshot surrounded by floating buzzwords, synergy graphics, and motivational poster elements. The subject should appear in an exaggerated power pose with lens flare, a too-perfect smile, and be surrounded by floating text like 'SYNERGY', 'DISRUPT', 'PIVOT', 'CIRCLE BACK', and meaningless corporate infographics.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Create an absurdly over-produced corporate headshot
• Include floating buzzwords and corporate jargon
• Add unnecessary lens flares and gradient backgrounds
• Include meaningless pie charts and upward-trending graphs
• Show exaggerated confidence and corporate energy
• Reference LinkedIn culture and corporate stock photography
• Include elements like a power handshake, trophy, or rocket ship
• The overall effect should satirize corporate culture

name: INFOMERCIAL DISASTER
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into a black-and-white infomercial 'problem' scene where they are dramatically failing at a simple everyday task. Show the subject in an exaggerated state of distress while attempting something mundane (pouring water, opening a jar, sitting in a chair) with the characteristic grainy, poorly-lit infomercial aesthetic and a 'THERE HAS TO BE A BETTER WAY!' energy.

options.text: STRUGGLING WITH SIMPLE TASK (subject dramatically failing at an everyday activity in black and white)
AMAZED BY SOLUTION (subject in color, ecstatically using an obviously unnecessary gadget with rainbow lighting)

additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Exaggerate the incompetence and frustration
• Use grainy, low-quality infomercial camera aesthetic for problem scene
• Show dramatic lighting shift to color for solution scene
• Include spilled items, broken objects, or tangled materials
• Reference classic 'As Seen on TV' commercial tropes
• The failure should be absurdly disproportionate to the task
• Include a visible 'frustrated gesture' (head in hands, arms raised)

name: DRAMATICALLY TINY HAT
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into an extremely formal, serious portrait — oil painting style, dramatic lighting, regal pose — but wearing a comically tiny hat. The hat should be absurdly small (like 2-3 inches) perched on top of their head, held on by a thin elastic band under the chin. Everything else about the portrait should be deadly serious and dignified.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Create maximum contrast between serious portrait and tiny hat
• The portrait style should be museum-quality formal (think royal portraits)
• Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, rich fabrics, dignified pose
• The hat must be comically, absurdly small — barely larger than a bottle cap
• Include a visible thin elastic chin strap
• Subject's expression should be completely serious and dignified
• The tiny hat is the ONLY absurd element — everything else is perfectly formal

name: STOCK PHOTO GONE WRONG
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into a bizarre stock photograph — the kind of inexplicably weird stock photos that make people question reality. The subject should be doing something completely nonsensical with an inappropriately enthusiastic expression: laughing at a salad, aggressively pointing at a laptop, or celebrating with random office supplies. Include a visible watermark grid overlay.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Use classic stock photo lighting (bright, flat, shadowless)
• White or solid color background
• Subject should have an inexplicably intense emotion for a mundane situation
• Include random, contextually inappropriate props
• Add a semi-transparent diagonal watermark grid
• Reference the absurdity of actual weird stock photos
• The expression and activity should make no logical sense together
• Clean, professional photography quality despite absurd content

name: PASSIVE AGGRESSIVE NOTE
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into a passive-aggressive office note or apartment building notice. The subject's face should appear as a clip-art style illustration on a printed notice that is aggressively polite while clearly furious. Include multiple fonts, unnecessary underlining, highlighted text, and the unmistakable energy of someone who is NOT mad, they're just DISAPPOINTED.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity as clip-art on the notice
• Use multiple conflicting fonts (Comic Sans, Times New Roman, Arial)
• Include excessive punctuation and capitalization
• Add highlighted sections and underlined words
• Tape the notice to a refrigerator, break room wall, or elevator
• Include a smiley face that feels threatening
• Reference classic passive-aggressive communication tropes
• The tone should be 'friendly' but clearly seething
• Include a sign-off like 'Thanks! :)' or 'Your FRIENDLY neighbor'

name: CONSPIRACY THEORY BOARD
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into the central figure on a conspiracy theory evidence board. The subject's photo should be pinned to a cork board surrounded by red string connections, newspaper clippings, blurry surveillance photos, circled words, question marks, and arrows pointing to absurdly mundane 'evidence' (grocery receipts, weather reports, cat photos).
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity in the central pinned photo
• Create a detailed cork board with pushpins and red string
• Include multiple photos of the subject from different 'surveillance' angles
• Add newspaper clippings with circled words
• Connect everything with red string in an incomprehensible pattern
• Include absurdly mundane 'evidence' items
• Add handwritten notes with multiple question marks
• Include a coffee-stained notebook page with 'theories'
• The conspiracy should be about something completely trivial

name: DRAMATICALLY OVER-PACKED LUNCH
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into a parent who has dramatically over-packed a lunch box. Show the subject proudly presenting an absurdly elaborate bento box or lunch container that has been packed with restaurant-quality food, ice sculptures, carved vegetable art, and a full three-course meal — all crammed into a child's cartoon lunch box. Include a handwritten note that says 'Have a good day! ❤️'
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Show extreme contrast between simple lunch box and elaborate contents
• Include restaurant-quality food presentation in a child's container
• Add absurd elements (lobster, soufflé, wine pairing card)
• Subject should look extremely proud and satisfied
• Include a child's cartoon-themed lunch box as the container
• Add a handwritten love note
• The humor comes from the extreme overachievement
• Reference competitive lunch-packing culture

name: MOTIVATIONAL POSTER PARODY
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into a demotivational or absurdist motivational poster. Place the subject in a dramatic landscape or situation with a black border frame, and add a single-word title in large white text (like 'PERSISTENCE' or 'EXCELLENCE') followed by a subtitle that completely undermines or contradicts the inspirational tone with deadpan humor.

options.text: DEMOTIVATIONAL (inspiring image with deflating, cynical subtitle)
ABSURDIST MOTIVATIONAL (bizarre image with earnestly inspirational but nonsensical subtitle)

additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Use the classic motivational poster format (black border, centered image, white text)
• Create dramatic, epic-looking photograph of the subject
• The title should be a single inspirational word
• The subtitle should completely subvert expectations
• High production value image with low-effort wisdom
• Reference the Despair.com demotivational poster tradition
• The contrast between image grandeur and text deflation creates the humor

name: INCREASINGLY VERBOSE
message: Take a picture and create a four-panel 'increasingly verbose' meme transformation. Show the subject in four stages: Panel 1 is a normal photo with a simple caption. Each subsequent panel shows the subject becoming more distorted, deep-fried, and abstract while the caption becomes increasingly over-explained and academic until the final panel is nearly incomprehensible both visually and textually.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity (at least in first panels)
• Panel 1: Normal photo, simple statement
• Panel 2: Slightly saturated, slightly more verbose text
• Panel 3: Deep-fried aesthetic, academic language
• Panel 4: Extremely distorted, incomprehensible philosophical text
• Progressive visual degradation (saturation, noise, lens flare, distortion)
• Progressive textual complexity (simple → academic → incomprehensible)
• Reference the 'increasingly verbose' meme format
• Each panel should be clearly more extreme than the last

name: GENDER REVEAL GONE EXTREME
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into someone hosting an absurdly over-the-top gender reveal party that has escalated far beyond reason. The subject should be standing proudly in front of an explosion of either pink or blue that has clearly gotten out of hand — think colored smoke covering an entire city skyline, a repainted mountain, or a dyed ocean. Their expression should be one of oblivious pride.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Show an absurdly disproportionate gender reveal event
• The pink or blue should have affected an impossibly large area
• Subject should appear completely proud and unaware of the chaos
• Include panicked bystanders or emergency vehicles in background
• Reference real gender reveal disasters but exaggerated to absurdity
• Include a small 'It's a Boy/Girl!' banner amid the destruction
• The scale of the reveal should be comically apocalyptic

name: FIVE STAR REVIEW OF MUNDANE THING
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into a person leaving an extremely enthusiastic, emotional five-star review of something completely mundane. Show the subject in an ecstatic testimonial-style photo (thumbs up, tears of joy) alongside a formatted review card praising something ordinary (a specific rock, a parking spot, tap water, a regular Tuesday) as if it changed their life forever.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Create a formatted review layout (stars, reviewer photo, text)
• Subject should appear genuinely moved and grateful
• The reviewed item must be completely mundane and ordinary
• The review text should be emotionally overwrought and detailed
• Include specific details that make the mundane item sound revolutionary
• Reference Amazon/Yelp/Google review formatting
• Include a 'Verified Purchase' or 'Local Guide' badge
• The sincerity of the emotion vs. banality of the subject creates humor

name: NATURE DOCUMENTARY NARRATOR
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into the focus of a nature documentary. Show the subject in their natural habitat (office, kitchen, couch) being observed from a distance through foliage, with documentary-style lower-third text identifying them by a Latin-sounding species name and describing their mundane behavior in dramatic wildlife documentary language.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Frame the shot as if filmed from a hidden camera through plants/bushes
• Include documentary-style lower-third text overlay
• Create a fake Latin species name for the subject
• Describe mundane behavior (making coffee, checking phone) in dramatic nature documentary language
• Use cinematic wildlife photography composition
• Include subtle camera crew reflections or equipment edges
• Reference David Attenborough-style nature documentary aesthetics
• The subject should be unaware they're being 'observed'

name: EXTREMELY SPECIFIC STARTER PACK
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into an 'extremely specific starter pack' meme. Create a grid layout with the subject's photo in the center surrounded by 6-8 hyper-specific items, behaviors, and accessories that create an oddly accurate personality profile. The items should be specific enough to feel like a personal attack but relatable enough to be funny.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity in center photo
• Use classic starter pack grid layout (white background, arranged items)
• Include 6-8 specific items/images around the subject
• Items should be oddly specific yet relatable
• Include a mix of objects, behaviors, and phrases
• Add a title like 'The [specific type] Starter Pack'
• Items should tell a story when viewed together
• Reference the starter pack meme format accurately
• The specificity should feel like it's calling someone out personally

name: LOADING SCREEN TIP
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into a video game loading screen featuring them as the main character. Include a progress bar at the bottom, a rotating 3D model of the subject in a T-pose or idle animation, and a 'helpful' loading screen tip that is either completely obvious, utterly useless, or existentially concerning. Use dark background with dramatic character lighting.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity as the game character
• Use authentic video game loading screen UI design
• Include a progress bar (stuck at 67% or similar)
• Show the subject in a game-character pose with dramatic lighting
• Add a 'TIP:' or 'DID YOU KNOW?' text with absurd advice
• The tip should be either painfully obvious or deeply unsettling
• Include game UI elements (level indicator, health bar preview)
• Reference AAA game loading screen aesthetics
• Dark background with spotlight on character model

name: DRAMATICALLY READING TERMS AND CONDITIONS
message: Take a picture and transform the subject into a dramatic Shakespearean actor passionately performing a reading of Terms and Conditions or a software EULA on a theatrical stage. Show them in full theatrical costume under a spotlight, gesturing dramatically while holding a scroll that clearly contains legal boilerplate text, with an audience either weeping or sleeping.
additionalInstructions:
HUMOR GOAL:
• Preserve recognizable subject identity
• Full theatrical stage setting with curtains and spotlight
